message.content:
**Title (Titolo):** Gucci Basket High-Top Sneaker
**Subtitle (Sottotitolo):** White and Blue High-Top Sneaker with Distinctive Features
**Short Description (Breve Descrizione):** Inspired by 90s basketball sneakers, the Gucci Basket high-top sneaker combines bold style with eco-friendly materials. Crafted from Demetra, a pliable and resilient material, this shoe features a mix of brightly colored fabrics and a lightly distressed effect. Perfect for making a statement, this sneaker is both stylish and sustainable.

**Description (Descrizione):**

- **Inspiration:** The Gucci Basket high-top sneaker draws inspiration from the iconic basketball sneakers of the 90s, blending nostalgic charm with modern eco-friendly materials.
- **Material:** Crafted primarily from Demetra, a material created with the same processes used for tanning, offering pliable and resilient performance with a supple finish.
- **Design:**
  - **Upper:** Synthetic upper with a mix of brightly colored fabrics and a lightly distressed effect.
  - **Lacing:** Lace-up closure for a secure fit.
  - **Details:**
    - **Gucci Logo:** Rubber Interlocking G patch at the side.
    - **Ankle Padding:** Contrast padding at the ankle for added comfort.
    - **Tongue and Vamp:** Signature details at the vamp, tongue, and sole.
    - **Paneled Design:** Paneled construction for a structured look.
  - **Sole:** Rubber sole with a low heel.
- **Sustainability:** The eco-friendly Demetra material combines animal-free raw materials primarily from sustainable, renewable, and bio-based sources.
- **Size:** Available in size 41.5.
- **Additional Features:**
  - **Box and Dust Bag:** Includes a box and dust bag for storage and protection.
  - **Production Time:** Production time is 3-5 working days.
  - **Quality:** This product is of the best quality, ensuring durability and comfort.
  - **Made in Italy:** Crafted with precision and care in Italy.
